scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/assets --shell=bun build && bun run --cwd packages/types --shell=bun build && bun run --cwd packages/schemas --shell=bun build && bun run --cwd packages/utils --shell=bun build
scripts.typecheck:packages: bun run --cwd packages/assets --shell=bun typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/types --shell=bun typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/schemas --shell=bun typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/utils --shell=bun typecheck
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:packages && bun run typecheck:packages && bun run --cwd apps/mobile --shell=bun typecheck
scripts.verify: bun run lint && bun run lint:mobile && bun run lint:architecture && bun run typecheck && bun run test
